description: '''Grindie''' (also known as '''grime-indie''' or '''grime indie''') is a [[fusion genre]] that emerged in the 2000s which merges [[indie rock]] or [[alternative rock]] with [[Grime (music genre)|grime]] music. The term "grindie" was originally coined by music journalist John Doran in 2004 and later adopted by producer Statik who developed the style through the compilation album ''Grindie Vol. 1'' and his collaborations with the English indie rock band [[Larrikin Love]].
